creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->closed


Your port has been committed (Yes, you are allowed to say "finally!" sorry 
for the delay). I had to make a couple changes, apparently the URL for 
the source files has changed, and I undid your minor abuse of the 
PORTREVISION variable. I also modified one line to fit into 80 columns 
and upgraded to the latest patchset while I was at it.
